tests.scenario: Sleep Quick Start starts playback in one tap
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Navigate to the main sleep entry screen.
Tap Sleep Quick Start once.
Measure time to playback start and check for extra setup screens.
tests.expected_result: Playback begins within 3 seconds and no additional setup screen is required.

tests.scenario: Sleep filters return only matching content
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Open sleep browsing and apply narrator, duration range, and content type filters.
Load filtered results.
Verify each result against selected filters, then clear filters and confirm full list returns.
tests.expected_result: All returned items match selected filters, and clearing filters restores the unfiltered list.

tests.scenario: Short Sleep collection contains brief sessions
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Open the Short Sleep collection.
Inspect duration metadata for listed sessions.
Record any session longer than 10 minutes.
tests.expected_result: Every listed Short Sleep session has a duration of 10 minutes or less.

tests.scenario: Mood and time selections drive meditation recommendations
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Open recommendations and select one mood and one time range.
Generate recommendations.
Count returned sessions and check each session duration against selected range.
tests.expected_result: At least 5 sessions are returned, and each session duration falls within the selected time range.

tests.scenario: Favorite session appears in Favorites and plays directly
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Open a guided session and mark it as Favorite.
Open Favorites.
Locate the saved session and start playback from Favorites.
tests.expected_result: The favorited session appears in Favorites and starts playback in one tap.

tests.scenario: Subscription confirmation shows complete billing details
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Start a subscription flow and proceed to the final confirmation screen.
Inspect the billing section before confirming.
Verify presence of price, trial length, renewal date, and renewal amount on the same screen.
tests.expected_result: All required billing details are visible on the final confirmation screen before confirmation.

tests.scenario: In-app cancellation ends with explicit confirmation
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid subscribed account.
Open subscription settings and initiate cancellation.
Complete the cancellation flow.
Check final confirmation message and account subscription status.
tests.expected_result: The system shows cancellation confirmation with effective date and updates subscription status to canceled.

tests.scenario: Billing history entries include required charge details
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Open billing history.
Review multiple entries if available.
Verify each entry includes charge date, amount, plan or term, and transaction source/reference.
tests.expected_result: Every billing history entry includes charge date, amount, plan or term, and transaction source or reference.

tests.scenario: Voice/background controls update guided audio output quickly
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Start guided audio playback.
Adjust voice volume and background volume controls separately.
Measure response time and verify updated levels remain active during current session.
tests.expected_result: Audio output reflects each volume change within 1 second and settings persist for the current session.

tests.scenario: Narrator search opens narrator page with related sessions
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Search using a narrator name.
Open the narrator page from search results.
Confirm the page lists sessions attributed to that narrator.
tests.expected_result: User can open a narrator page from narrator search and view related sessions attributed to that narrator.

tests.scenario: Core workflows remain reliable after update
steps: Install or update to the latest app version.
Launch the app and complete login.
Run search and start playback.
Observe for crashes, freezes, or blocking errors in each flow.
tests.expected_result: Startup, login, search, and playback flows complete without crash, freeze, or blocking error after update.

tests.scenario: Search results are categorized and respond to filter refinement
steps: Launch the app and sign in with a valid account.
Enter a keyword query in search.
Inspect category labels on returned results.
Apply one or more filters and verify results update to matching items only.
tests.expected_result: Each result shows a category label, and applying filters updates the list to only matching items.
